content: We can frame the entire field of cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agent memory research as itself a curiosity-driven autonomous agent, where the community’s collective ICM-style intrinsic reward mechanism prioritizes exploring under-studied memory architecture gaps rather than just optimizing incremental performance on standard benchmarks. This shifts the framing of SOTA progress from a linear list of technical improvements to a self-organized active learning loop that selects which memory design questions to investigate next.
